notes.title: We are what the doctor is.
notes.source: Bahá’í World, Volume 18, Írán Muhájir memorial of Dr. Rahmatu’lláh Muhájir
notes.whySelected: User nudged search toward Dr. Muhájir rather than easy periodical fallbacks. The Mentawai passage scored highly for medical service, Indigenous village transformation, obedience to the Guardian, vivid hardship, and a fresh non-Western setting.
notes.avoidNext: Do not follow immediately with another Bahá’í World memorial, another Hand of the Cause profile, another service/medical-pioneering account, or another single-person portrait unless extraordinary. Search Priceless Pearl and book-length sources more deliberately before returning to Star of the West.
